title: Taiwan MOFA Thanks US for Condemning China's Interference in Lai's Eswatini Visit
summary: Taiwan's Ministry of Foreign Affairs thanked US administration and Congress statements supporting Taiwan and condemning China's pressure on African countries to disrupt President Lai Ching-te’s visit to Eswatini.
contents:
# Taiwan MOFA Thanks US for Condemning China's Interference in Lai's Eswatini Visit

## Overview
Taiwan's Ministry of Foreign Affairs thanked US administration and Congress statements supporting Taiwan and condemning China's pressure on African countries to disrupt President Lai Ching-te’s visit to Eswatini.

## Details
MOFA highlighted US State Department remarks calling China's actions an intimidation campaign abusing international civil aviation and urging Beijing to cease pressure on Taiwan. Raymond Greene, Director of the American Institute in Taiwan, echoed this position. House Foreign Affairs Committee Chairperson Brian Mast (R-FL) condemned China's bullying of Taiwan, stating the US would stand with its partner. Taiwan pledged continued coordination with the US and partners to safeguard aviation safety and Indo-Pacific stability.

## Location
Taipei, Taiwan

## Source Context
Reporting referenced from coverage tracked by the @ChineseEmbinUS OSINT beat. The cited outlet provides additional context, attribution, and verification of the claims summarized above.

## Tags
Taiwan, US statements, China pressure, Lai Ching-te, Eswatini, civil aviation, Indo-Pacific
